case_title: CHEN'S PLUMBING CONTRACTOR VS WALSH JOHN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,248.40 FILED BY CHEN'S PLUMBING CONTRACTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
